Rules.InvariantScript: "Do You Want To Make Changes To This Job?"
"This job has already been completed.  It is suggested that you open the job in view-only mode unless you need to make changes."

Rules.InvariantScript:
Table(
{Title: "Homeowner", Icon: Icon.Home, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Rooms", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Labour", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Materials", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Signatures", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Summary", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Final Steps", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Notes", Icon: Icon.Note, Screen: App.ActiveScreen}
)

ControlPropertyState.AutoRuleBindingString:
Table(
{Title: "Homeowner", Icon: Icon.Home, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Rooms", Icon: Icon.People},
{Title: "Labour", Icon: Icon.People},
{Title: "Materials", Icon: Icon.People},
{Title: "Signatures", Icon: Icon.People},
{Title: "Summary", Icon: Icon.People},
{Title: "Final Steps", Icon: Icon.People}
)
If(Self.Layout = Layout.Horizontal, Min(280, Self.Width - 60), Min(280, Self.Height - 60))

Table(
{Title: "Homeowner", Icon: Icon.Home, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Rooms", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Labour", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Materials", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Signatures", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Summary", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Final Steps", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen}
)

Rules.InvariantScript:
gblRecordJobCurrent.'Address Street 1' 
& If(!IsBlank(gblRecordJobCurrent.'Address Street 2'),",")& gblRecordJobCurrent.'Address Street 2'
& If(!IsBlank(gblRecordJobCurrent.'Address Street 3'),",")& gblRecordJobCurrent.'Address Street 3'
& If(!IsBlank(gblRecordJobCurrent.City),", ")& gblRecordJobCurrent.City
& If(!IsBlank(gblRecordJobCurrent.State),", ")& gblRecordJobCurrent.State
& If(!IsBlank(gblRecordJobCurrent.'Zip Code'),", ")&gblRecordJobCurrent.'Zip Code'

Text(
    gblRecordJobCurrent.'Start Date Time',
    "[$-en-US]mmm d, h:mm AM/PM"
)

LookUp(
    colCdsMarketSegments,
    colCdsMarketSegments[@'Market Segment'] = gblRecordJobCurrent.'Market Segment'.'Market Segment',
    Name
)
